content.problemStatement:
Read problem statements in Vietnamese,There are NNN cities in Chefland numbered from 111 to NNN and every city has a railway station. Some cities have a train and each city has at most one train originating from it. The trains are represented by an array AAA, where Ai=0A_i = 0Ai‚Äč=0 means the iii-th city doesn't have any train originating from it, Ai=1A_i = 1Ai‚Äč=1 means the train originating from the iii-th city is moving right (to a higher numbered city), and Ai=2A_i = 2Ai‚Äč=2 means the train originating from the iii-th city is moving left (to a lower numbered city).

Each train keeps on going forever in its direction and takes 111 minute to travel from the current station to the next one. There is a special station at city 111 which lets travellers instantaneously teleport to any other station that currently has a train. Teleportation and getting on a train once in the city both take 000 minutes and all trains start at time 000.

There are MMM travellers at city 111, and the iii-th traveller has destination city BiB_iBi‚Äč. They ask Chef to guide them to teleport to a particular station from which they can catch a train to go to their destination in the least time possible. In case it's not possible for a person to reach his destination, print ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1.

**Note:** The input and output of this problem are large, so prefer using fast input/output methods.

###Input


The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains three lines of input.
The first line contains two integers NNN, MMM.
The second line contains NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
The third line contains MMM integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BMB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_MB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BM‚Äč.
###Output
For each test case, output MMM space-separated integers C1,C2,‚Ä¶,CMC_1, C_2, \ldots, C_MC1‚Äč,C2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,CM‚Äč, where CiC_iCi‚Äč is the minimum time required by the iii-th traveller to reach his destination and if the iii-th traveller can't reach his destination, Ci=‚ąí1C_i = -1Ci‚Äč=‚ąí1.

###Constraints


1‚Č§N,M‚Č§1051 \leq N, M \leq 10^51‚Č§N,M‚Č§105
0‚Č§Ai‚Č§20 \leq A_i \leq 20‚Č§Ai‚Äč‚Č§2
1‚Č§Bi‚Č§N1 \leq B_i \leq N1‚Č§Bi‚Äč‚Č§N
The sum of NNN over all test cases is at most 10610^6106.
The sum of MMM over all test cases is at most 10610^6106.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: The only person takes the train from station 111 and hence takes ‚ą£5‚ąí1‚ą£=4|5 - 1| = 4‚ą£5‚ąí1‚ą£=4 minutes to reach his destination.
Test Case 222: The only person takes the train from station 555 and hence takes ‚ą£5‚ąí4‚ą£=1|5 - 4| = 1‚ą£5‚ąí4‚ą£=1 minute to reach his destination.
Test Case 333: Since no train passes station 333, it's impossible for the first person to reach his destination and since the second person is already at station 111, it takes him 000 minutes to reach his destination.
